R48.5.11: UN R48 §5.11 — Automatic Levelling: If the vehicle is equipped with LED light sources, an automatic levelling device is mandatory. The system must compensate for static pitch variations within 30 seconds of vehicle loading changes. Static bending lamps are excluded from this requirement.
R48.6.1: UN R48 §6.1 — Number of Headlamps: Each vehicle shall be equipped with at least two headlamps emitting a main-beam and a passing-beam. Headlamps shall be symmetrically disposed about the longitudinal median plane.
R48.6.2: UN R48 §6.2 — Mounting Height: The height of headlamps shall be between 500 mm and 1,200 mm from the ground, measured to the centre of the illuminating surface of the headlamp.
R112.5.3: UN R112 §5.3 — Beam Cutoff: The vertical gradient of the cut-off line shall not exceed 0.57° (10% at 25m distance). Asymmetrical passing beam must produce a horizontal cut-off on the left and a 15° upward inclination on the right.
R112.5.5: UN R112 §5.5 — Colour Temperature: The correlated colour temperature of LED headlamp sources shall not exceed 6,000 K. Sources with CCT below 3,000 K are permitted only for fog lamps.
